title: God Is Calling You
author: Jennifer Asomie
excerpt: An article adapted from a sermon by Pastor Taiwo Oyemade. Samuel's story gives insight into hearing and responding to God's voice — and what it means to truly listen.

title: Fruit Bearing Branches
author: Jennifer Asomie
excerpt: An article adapted from a sermon by Pastor Pelumi Ajayi. Jesus employs the metaphor of a vine and its branches to discuss truths about our relationship with him and our mission to the world.

title: Loving Christ's Way
author: Mary Oiza Egbe
excerpt: There's one word in today's world that suffers from overuse and yet in its usage, very little of it is propagated. It is the word "Love".

title: Fish, Faith and Obedience
author: Jennifer Asomie
excerpt: An article adapted from a sermon by Pastor Taiwo Oyemade. The scriptures reveal insights into the dynamics between human initiative and divine intervention through the journey of faith and obedience.

title: The Pure Heart Touches God
author: Jennifer Asomie
excerpt: An article adapted from a sermon by Pastor Taiwo Oyemade. Throughout history, humanity has struggled with the mystery of divine communication — but God's voice cannot be limited by human constraints.

title: Spiritual Transformation
author: Jennifer Asomie
excerpt: An article adapted from a sermon by Pastor Taiwo Oyemade. Transformation is not merely a superficial alteration of behavior — it demands a profound change in the core of one's being.

title: God Is Speaking! Can You Hear?
author: Jennifer Asomie
excerpt: An article adapted from a sermon by Pastor Taiwo Oyemade. Hearing God's voice begins with a fundamental prerequisite: open ears.
